title: Racetrack by Hand
brief: Fly a four-corner circuit. Turn each corner with a Direction-only UPDATE.
teaches: NEW sets a full command; UPDATE amends one field of the active command. Steering the circuit with single-field (Heading) UPDATEs keeps bus traffic to a minimum — the racetrack par only falls to partial updates.

objective._doc: waypoint-sequence: pass the four corner zones in order, then hold the last. Flown by position-threshold steering (no brain timer yet) — fidelity lie.
